title: Who&When Pro: Can LLMs Really Attribute Failures in AI Agents?

official_code_repository.audit: Five archive entries: one 2,959-byte README, one illustration, and directories. README marks evaluation code, data, dependencies, reproduction scripts, prediction format, paper, and citation as coming soon. No license, tags, or GitHub releases were present at acquisition.

official_project_repository.audit: The static site archive contains 74 entries and six illustrative trace JSON files, not the claimed 12,326-row benchmark or evaluation/result corpus. The examples cover LVBench/EVA, HumanEval/MacNet, three MMSearch/smolagents cases, and SimpleQA-Verified/Magentic-One.

version_boundary: Immutable arXiv v1 was submitted 2026-07-10. Both inspected official commits are dated 2026-07-12 and therefore are post-v1 evidence, not proof of the exact paper-time implementation. The paper states that all traces, labels, and evaluation code are released, while the inspected official code README says data and code are not public yet.
